goal: Add a GET /ready endpoint to backend/server.py that checks whether the service is ready to accept traffic. It should verify: (1) the app is running, (2) any required env vars are set. Return {"ready": true, "checks": {"app": "ok"}} on success with HTTP 200, or {"ready": false, "checks": {...}} with HTTP 503 if not ready. Add pytest tests for both the ready and not-ready cases.
acceptance_criteria: GET /ready returns 200 and ready:true when service is healthy
